news.t: BlackRock Debuts First Buffer ETFs With Launch of Two Funds

overview.description: The iShares Large Cap Deep Quarterly Laddered ETF (IVVB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund seeks to participate in the price movement of US large-cap stocks, up to a cap, while applying a downside hedge against declines occurring in the range of 5-20%, during a calendar quarter. The actively managed fund holds IVV ETF options with overlapping expiry dates. IVVB was launched on Jun 28, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Debuts First Buffer ETFs With Launch of Two Funds
